title: Trimezia northiana
taxonomy: Trimezia northiana is classified within the family Iridaceae, which includes other irises and related plants. This family is part of the larger clade Asparagales, a group of flowering plants characterized by their unique flowers and seed production. Trimezia northiana is further grouped into the genus Trimezia, a group of plants native to Central and South America. The genus Trimezia is thought to be closely related to the genus Liatris and other plants within the Iridaceae family. The exact classification of Trimezia northiana is still being studied and refined by botanists.
